info.title: Run go vet on internal/tool (@general subagent)

parts.text:
You are working in the Go project at /Users/jaronswab/go/src/github.com/jrswab/axe.

Run these two commands and return the EXACT output of each:

1. `go vet ./internal/tool/`
2. `go test ./internal/tool/ -run TestURLFetch -v -count=1`

Return the full output of both commands. Do not edit any files.
I'll run both commands and return the exact output.
